prompt: i want to make some sleep music for my baby on youtube. can you help me with a suno prompt?

assertions.text: Did NOT output a final Suno Style of Music string (no premature prompt)
Asked at least one clarifying question about the function (length, baby age, channel context, or reference tracks)
Offered the Quickstart vs from-scratch fork from Phase 1, OR pre-filtered preset suggestions to baby-relevant ones
Avoided medicalised verbs (heal, cure, treat) in any output framing
